title: Delft, South Holland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Delft, South Holland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Delft is a city in South Holland with a population of 109,577. A quaint, historic city renowned for Delftware blue pottery, a top technical university, and a charming canal-lined city centre between The Hague and Rotterdam.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
